content.en:
After obtaining the intermediate trick talent, Ye Tian at least had a little talent in the trick talent and could go to practice.

But he doesn't have a cheat on this yet, and he has to get it.

In fact, the Void Heaven Palace also had the cheats of the Mysterious Heaven and Earth, but he didn't look through it, and the Void Heaven Palace didn't recommend him to read it.

Because if you look at the cheats of the world with your real body, you will involuntarily deduce it, and it will be mixed with the understanding and perception of other paths.

If it's just a concurrent study, it's not a big problem.

But his purpose is to create the ultimate dimensional killing move in this area, so he can't have a trace of the outside world's understanding, otherwise he will take the wrong path, and it will be impossible to create the ultimate dimensional killing move of the treacherous world.

"If you want to get the cheats of the trick, you have to go to that place!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

That is the tooth gang of the "843" pool in this city, which is actually a beggar gang, and this kind of gang does everything except begging, sneaking, abduction, and cheating.

However, the Tooth Gang is seriously short of people, because this gang often dies, but I have to admit that the top leaders of this gang are still very powerful, and at the same time, they will also pass on some secret secrets to the gang disciples.

They don't have any age requirements for recruiting, let alone eight years old, but three years old.

In the next few days, Ye Tian first recovered his body, and then he came to join the Tooth Gang.

Facing Ye Tian, who was sent to the door, the Tooth Gang naturally accepted it directly, and easily let him join.

After entering the Tooth Gang, Ye Tian was sent on a mission to pick up things on the battlefield of the Mysterious Forest.

Just yesterday, in the treacherous woods outside the city, a group of treacherous powerhouses and strange things were killed, and a large number of strong people fell, although many treasures have been snatched away and scraped away, but there are still some fragments and so on, a little bit of leakage is a big harvest.

Therefore, the Tooth Gang sent many gang disciples to pick up leaks, but many of them encountered the breath of the power of treachery and died.

In other words, Ye Tian was actually used as cannon fodder.

But even if it is cannon fodder, after being on the list, clothes and leakage cheats will still be given, and they are not worth it anyway.

【Trickster】

This is the secret book of the tooth gang, the trickster is to absorb the power of trickery to strengthen the spiritual power, but then use the spiritual power to affect the hand, so that the hands gradually produce some kind of change, can ingest items in the air, is a stunt of stealing.

And only by practicing tricksters can you touch some items that contain tricky powers.

Ye Tian observed this trick cheat, and after an hour, he gradually understood a little mystery of the trick power, and perfected the trick to several grades in a breath.

Followed by.

Ye Tian began to visualize, and his spiritual power slowly absorbed the power of the outside world.

Rumble!!!!

The power of trickery is captured and integrated into the spirit by the spiritual power, and the spiritual power of oneself can be easily released.

Then, the spiritual power after the transformation began to affect the hands, so that the hands were transformed by this special spiritual power, containing a trace of special trickery power means.

Gradually, Ye Tian's hands had some kind of special change.

However, his physical fitness did not improve.

"Sure enough, the way of trickery has no great effect on refining the body, and the improvement of physical fitness is very slow. Only when you break through the great realm, your physical fitness will be slightly improved. Ye Tian said darkly.

Compared with the strong people of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, the strong people of the Mysterious Heaven and Earth are extremely weak in flesh, and perhaps the strongest ones are not as good as the physical bodies of the three-dimensional and four-dimensional powerhouses.

However, the world of the treacherous realm is dominated by the power of treachery, and the patience for the physical body is not strong, and some strong people still survive by relying on the powerful spiritual power of treachery even if they lose their physical bodies.

After an overnight cultivation, Ye Tian already had a certain amount of combat power, relying on his perfect trickery, coupled with his own control of strength.

He can guarantee that a trace of strength can burst out ten times or even dozens of times the combat power.

Therefore, now that he is an eight-year-old child, he can still burst out with terrifying strength.

"The forest is too dangerous, I have my strength now, there is a high probability that there will be some accidents, and I still can't go!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And so.

He made a decision, and that was to defect to the Fangs.

Late at night.

He sneaked directly into the residence of one of the head of the Fang Gang, and immediately broke the opponent's neck directly in the air, and then took away all his belongings and some trick cheats, and then set fire to the area.

......

After returning home.

Ye Tian kept a low profile and didn't go out.

The Tooth Gang didn't know where his home was, and that fire burned a lot of things, so how would the Tooth Gang care about a new eight-year-old child, who might think that the eight-year-old child was killed in the fire!

Ye Tian stayed at home and lived for a few days, and no one came to trouble him.

So, he stayed at home with peace of mind, and he prepared some food, enough to live on his own for a month.

And in the following days, Ye Tian continued to improve his research according to the secret book of the master.

Although it is still a secret book that does not enter the stream, at least it allows Ye Tian to know more about the trickery.

And according to those secret books, he knew the division of sophistry.

The sophistry is divided according to the transformation of spiritual power, a total of eighteen transformations, after eighteen transformations, you need to carry out a real spiritual transformation, after such a transformation is completed, you will become the master of the sophistication.

This division is similar to the divine system of the divine dimension of heaven and earth.

A month later.

Ye Tian had already created a tricky secret method that suited him—Dark Star.

Dark Star is not a trick like a trick, but a trick secret method that specializes in absorbing tricky power to strengthen spiritual power, and it is of a very high grade.

After cultivating the Dark Star Secret Method, his spiritual power was rapidly improving, becoming more and more powerful, and he could already distort a building with his spiritual power.

The point is, he hasn't completely undergone a metamorphosis yet.

It can be seen from this that after he completes a 1.3 transformation of his spiritual power, how much his strength will increase.

"The most powerful trickster powerhouse in this small city is estimated to have completed two or three spiritual transformations, right?"

Ye Tian calculated.

Anyway, it's unlikely that there will be anything strong here.

The grain has been eaten, Ye Tian came out and went to buy food.

At this time, he clearly sensed that the atmosphere in the city was wrong, and many people were very panicked.

Soon, he used his powerful spiritual power to eavesdrop on other people's conversations, and finally knew why.

A powerful and strange creature has its sights on the small city, and anyone who tries to escape will be twisted to death by a strange force.

So, everyone was terrified.

Ye Tian looked at the sky, the gray sky was even darker, and the strange aura became more and more solemn, something was indeed wrong.
